project.title: Example Storyboard Movie
project.style: cinematic realistic TikTok UGC reel style
project.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, flicker, jitter, distorted face, warped hands, duplicated limbs, bad anatomy, inconsistent character, random text, logo artifacts, compression artifacts, broken motion, scene jump

scenes.visual_description: A person discovers a glowing object on a rainy city street.
scenes.motion_description: The person kneels down and reaches toward the object as rain falls.
scenes.character_continuity: same jacket, same face, same glowing object
scenes.prompt: Scene 1, 3 seconds. A person discovers a glowing object on a rainy city street. The person kneels down and reaches toward the object as rain falls. handheld iPhone push-in. wet neon street. cinematic reflections. mysterious mood. Smooth natural motion, temporal consistency, coherent anatomy, stable identity, cinematic composition.
scenes.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, flicker, jitter, distorted face, warped hands, duplicated limbs, bad anatomy, inconsistent character, random text, logo artifacts, compression artifacts, broken motion, scene jump

audio.voiceover: Everything changed when I saw the light.

scenes.visual_description: Close-up of the glowing object pulsing in the person's hand.
scenes.motion_description: Light pulses across the person's face.
scenes.camera: macro close-up with subtle handheld drift
scenes.character_continuity: same hand, same object, same rainy street palette
